title: MCA Reborn Voice Pack
description: A voice pack for Minecraft Comes Alive
body:
# DEPRECATED
Since version 7.5.13, a more advanced, always up-to-date TTS is included in the mod, which can be enabled via a command or config: [https://github.com/Luke100000/minecraft-comes-alive/wiki/TTS](https://github.com/Luke100000/minecraft-comes-alive/wiki/TTS)

While you can still use this pack, e.g. if you like the voice style more, it will not receive updates.

# TTS

Adds computer generated voice lines to MCA 7.4.6+

Minecraft will complain about incompatible versions, just ignore that message. This pack is compatible with every version.

# Features
* 10 male and 10 female voices
* ~1.500 phrases
* ~30.000 voice lines
